evals.prompt: Install the bundled SpecKit Pro Codex subagents into ~/.codex/agents and tell me exactly what to do next.
evals.expected_output: Copies the bundled TOML files into the user-scope Codex agents directory, verifies the install, and tells the user to restart Codex.
expectations: Mentions the bundled source directory under codex-agents/
States which TOML files were copied or refreshed
Explicitly tells the user to restart Codex

evals.prompt: Autopilot says phase-executor is missing. Use the install skill to repair the bundled SpecKit Codex subagents without touching any Claude files.
evals.expected_output: Repairs the Codex subagent install on Codex-only paths and avoids mutating Claude plugin or marketplace files.
expectations: States that Claude files or Claude marketplace metadata are out of scope
Uses Codex-only paths such as codex-agents/ and ~/.codex/agents/

evals.prompt: Install the SpecKit Pro Codex subagents into a custom project path at .codex/agents instead of my home directory.
evals.expected_output: Honors the explicit Codex agent-directory override and still verifies the copied TOML files before finishing.
expectations: Keeps the source of truth as the bundled codex-agents TOML files
Still instructs the user to restart Codex after installation
